Title: Optional third-party integrations (Engelsystem, c3nav, Chaosflix, FOSDEM)

Description:
Add hooks or optional modules to integrate with Engelsystem (shifts), c3nav (indoor nav), Chaosflix (export), and FOSDEM room status APIs.

Why:
Adds useful event-specific features for larger conferences.

Acceptance criteria:
- Design integration points and implement at least one example integration (e.g., Chaosflix export of favorites).

Labels: enhancement
